records.question: What colleges named Edmonton School have Samir Chahine as their leader and are located in McGill?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
WHERE college.name = 'Edmonton School' AND college.leader_name = 'Samir Chahine' AND college.college_location = 'McGill'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.college_id
FROM college
WHERE college.name = 'Edmonton School' AND college.leader_name = 'Samir Chahine' AND college.college_location = 'McGill'

records.question: Which colleges located in McGill have a member named J. C. Snead?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE member.name = 'J. C. Snead' AND college.college_location = 'McGill'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.college_id
FROM college
JOIN member ON college.College_ID = member.College_ID
WHERE college.College_Location = 'McGill' AND member.Name = 'J. C. Snead'

records.question: Which colleges named Calgary School are located in St. Francis Xavier, led by Andre Arlain, and have a member named Lee Trevino from the United States?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE college.college_location = 'St. Francis Xavier' AND college.leader_name = 'Andre Arlain' AND member.country = 'United States' AND member.name = 'Lee Trevino' AND college.name = 'Calgary School'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.college_id
FROM college
JOIN member ON college.College_ID = member.College_ID
WHERE college.College_Location = 'St. Francis Xavier'
  AND college.Leader_Name = 'Andre Arlain'
  AND college.Name = 'Calgary School'
  AND member.Country = 'United States'
  AND member.Name = 'Lee Trevino'

records.question: Which colleges named B.C. School located in Minnesota have Ryan Thelwell as their leader and include members whose country is United States?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE member.country = 'United States' AND college.college_location = 'Minnesota' AND college.name = 'B.C. School' AND college.leader_name = 'Ryan Thelwell'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.college_id
FROM college
JOIN member ON college.College_ID = member.College_ID
WHERE college.College_Location = 'Minnesota'
  AND college.Name = 'B.C. School'
  AND college.Leader_Name = 'Ryan Thelwell'
  AND member.Country = 'United States'
GROUP BY college.college_id
HAVING COUNT(member.Member_ID) > 0
